title: ImplementationResult
description: JSON result returned by Codex after completing or failing an implementation task.

task_id.description: Must match the task_id of the ImplementationTask.

summary.description: Short human-readable summary of what was done or why it failed.

files_changed.description: List of file paths that were modified, added, or deleted.

validation_results.description: Results of validation commands run by Codex.

issues.description: List of problems, blockers, or uncertainties encountered.

proposed_followup_tasks.description: Follow-up tasks Codex proposes. Claude reviews these; Codex must NOT write them to tasks.json directly.

metadata.description: Arbitrary key/value metadata (e.g. token usage, model, run duration).
